introSection: Tren Minero is a steel roller coaster currently located at Fantasilandia in Santiago, Metropolitan Región, Chile.

sections.title: History
sections.content: The coaster originally opened at Ratanga Junction in South Africa under the name Diamond Devil Run in 1998. It would eventually close in 2014 to make way for land development on the west side of the park, which was demolished to make way for hotels and the like. The coaster itself would be relocated to Fantasilandia where it reopened on 14 November 2015.

fullText:
Tren Minero is a steel roller coaster currently located at Fantasilandia in Santiago, Metropolitan Región, Chile.

The coaster originally opened at Ratanga Junction in South Africa under the name Diamond Devil Run in 1998. It would eventually close in 2014 to make way for land development on the west side of the park, which was demolished to make way for hotels and the like. The coaster itself would be relocated to Fantasilandia where it reopened on 14 November 2015.



Red track and black supports.
